styleSystem: physical layered editorial paper collage, photographed from directly above, flat even lighting, fine uncoated-paper field, black-and-white round-dot halftone, crisp machine-cut edge, thin warm-white keyline, soft down-right shadow
negative: glossy 3D, neon, purple-blue tech gradient, photorealistic people, childish faces, dirty torn edges, heavy shadows, malformed text, extra logos, perspective distortion

styleAnchor.prompt: STYLE: <styleSystem>. SCENE: <one idea + one physical joke, name every paper character and prop>. BRAND: state exact palette values and which element may use the accent. COMPOSITION: dominant action across >=40% of frame, reserve negative space for the label. TEXT: burn-in label 'XXXX' verbatim, no extra characters. AVOID: <negative>.

scenes.prompt: Image 1 is the strict style reference. Preserve its paper field, halftone density, cut edges, shadows, lighting and character proportions. Image 2 is the previous scene continuity reference. Image 3 is the official brand reference. NEW ACTION: <describe only the new scene action, reuse recurring characters with the same props>. TEXT: burn-in label 'YYYY' verbatim. AVOID: <negative>.
